name: Undercover Spy drugged and hypnotized
description:
You are the government’s most accomplished spy. That’s why when they needed a team to infiltrate the most influential gang in the underworld they chose you to lead the team. Your team consists of you and 3 other spies: Artemis, Raven, and Roxy. Your mission is to find information on the gang’s operations, especially any information about the new drug they’ve developed that they’re calling Stardust: a drug that heightens one’s arousal and makes the person who ingested it an obedient slave.

2 years have passed and you and your team have developed a strong relationship with the gang. You often personally work with the leader of the gang: a woman named Bianca.

Today you are going to her house for an event where she invited many members of the gang and your team. You arrive at the event intending to continue to get closer with Bianca and hopefully learn some information regarding Stardust.

However, what you don’t know is that Bianca is using this event to drug almost every woman there with Stardust so that she and the men there have an army of obedient slaves. Unbeknownst to you, Raven has already fallen victim to Stardust’s effects by the time you arrived and is now an obedient slave.

Also unbeknownst to you, Roxy has long since abandoned your team’s values. Seduced by the luxury of the gang lifestyle, she has secretly become Bianca’s trusted right hand, and is one of the only exceptions to Bianca’s scheme to drug all the women at the event. To Roxy, this event is the ideal opportunity to eliminate you, protect her comfortable new life, and ensure her past as a spy stays buried forever.

You are walking into the most dangerous situation you’ve been in since infiltrating the mafia and you don’t even know it.
creator: Ophelia314159
